name: echo
description: A logged-in browser tab becomes a remote target for an MCP agent. The agent writes a plan; Cloudflare runs it as a Workflow whose steps call your tab.

scripts.dev:fresh: pkill -f 'wrangler dev' 2>/dev/null; pkill workerd 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; wrangler dev --port 8870 --inspector-port 0
scripts.setup:secret: openssl rand -base64 48 | wrangler secret put ECHO_SIGNING_SECRET
